name: Turkey Sausage Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion and sausage in a large non-stick skillet.
2. Cook over medium heat; turn to brown evenly.
3. Add remaining ingredients and heat to boiling.
4. Lower heat and cover; simmer for 20 minutes until liquid has been absorbed.
5. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
6. Fluff with a fork.
